holdings.infoBox: OEI is an equity ETF with a total of 105 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.69%, Microsoft at 5.09%, Amazon.com at 4.08%, Apple at 4.06%, and Alphabet at 3.56%.

overview.description: The Optimized Equity Income ETF (OEI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, aims to deliver steady monthly income through investments in US large-cap equities while employing an options overlay. The fund seeks long-term growth, with income as a secondary goal. OEI was launched on Oct 22, 2025 and is issued by Optimize.
